description_long: This is a dramatic, freestanding banner featuring a stylized, muscular human figure with arms raised, positioned beneath a wide, curved banner. The banner displays bold, high-contrast text that reads 'NO GODS OR KINGS. ONLY MAN,' with the words mirrored on the reverse side. The figure and banner are rendered in grayscale tones, giving the object a striking, monochromatic appearance. The structure appears to be a single, solid piece with no visible seams or joints, and the banner is seamlessly integrated with the supporting figure. The surface looks smooth and slightly reflective, suggesting a material like painted or coated plastic or metal. The overall form is tall and narrow, with the banner portion extending horizontally at the top.
description: A tall, freestanding banner with a grayscale human figure supporting a wide, curved sign displaying bold text. The design is dramatic and visually striking, with a smooth, slightly reflective surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muscular figure holding up the curved banner with clear, bold text and detailed anatomy.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the banner and the depth of the supporting figure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the mirrored text on the back of the banner and the back of the figure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the figure's side anatomy.
attribute_banner_content: bold text and stylized human figure
